title: Senior Product Designer
description:
We are looking for a UI/UX Designer to join our growing Produce Design team. This isn’t just another creative role—you’ll be designing the critical interfaces and workflows that connect all product lines and internal systems. Your work will directly shape the human experience of how our business runs at scale.

You’ll get to design and own end-to-end experiences that cut across multiple domains, solve complex usability and data visualization challenges, and bring efficiency and clarity to our operations. This is a high-impact, hands-on design role where your solutions will directly power the company’s growth and stability.

Responsibilities

  • Collaborate closely with product managers and stakeholders to translate business requirements into user-centric design goals.
  • Deliver end-to-end design solutions, and work closely with the development team to ensure the design meets the expected goals.
  • Maintain and update existing design systems and templates, ensuring consistency and quality across all platforms.
  • Analyze feedback to identify areas for improvement and propose comprehensive solutions to enhance the user experience, ensuring that user needs are effectively addressed.

Requirement

  • 4-5 years of experience in UI/UX design, preferably with a background in fintech related applications.
  • Clear understanding of UI/UX design principles and design systems, along with a user-centered mindset.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced working environment, quickly adapting to changes and driving product progress through continuous iteration.
  • Good communication skills and a collaborative mindset, capable of effectively facilitating cross-departmental teamwork.
  • Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite.

Nice to haves

  • Good understanding of blockchain mechanisms.
  • Experience in payment solutions.
  • Experience of user research and usability testing.

Perks & Benefits

  • Competitive total compensation package
  • Various team-building programs and company events
  • Comprehensive healthcare schemes for employees and dependants
  • And many more! Apply and let us tell you more!

postedCompany.description:
DGTL Technologies is a specialized service provider dedicated to delivering a full spectrum of front-office and back-office support solutions, each of which are tailored to the unique needs of global financial technology firms. DGTL Technologies is engaged by BTSE Group to offer several key positions, enabling the delivery of cutting-edge technology and tailored solutions that meet the evolving demands of the fintech industry in a competitive global market. 


BTSE Group is a leading global fintech and blockchain company that is committed to building innovative technology and infrastructure. BTSE empowers businesses and corporate clients with the advanced tools they need to excel in a rapidly evolving and competitive market. BTSE has pioneered numerous trading technologies that have been widely adopted across the industry, setting new benchmarks for innovation, performance, and security in fintech. BTSE’s diverse business lines serve both retail (B2C) customers and institutional (B2B) clients, enabling them to launch, operate, and scale fintech businesses. BTSE is seeking ambitious, motivated professionals to join our B2C and B2B teams.
postedCompany.name: DGTL TECHNOLOGIES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
